title: [LowerToHW] Don't gate reg randomization on reset
body:
Change randomization logic to NOT gate randomization based on a
deasserted reset signal when lowering a FIRRTL regreset.  This aligns
randomization with the Scala FIRRTL Compiler and prevents Xs from
showing up if the reset is not held low when the initial block runs.

Signed-off-by: Schuyler Eldridge <schuyler.eldridge@sifive.com>
